title: Grilled Steak with Vietnamese-Style Cha Gio
description: A fusion recipe that combines the flavors of grilled steak with the crispy, savory goodness of cha gio. This dish is perfect for a quick dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: 2. Season steak with salt and pepper. Grill for 5-7 minutes per side, or until desired level of doneness.
3. Meanwhile, heat hoisin sauce in a small saucepan over low heat.
4. Warm cha gio according to package instructions.
5. Assemble the dish by placing a piece of grilled steak on a plate, topping with a few pieces of warmed cha gio, and drizzling with hoisin sauce.
6. Garnish with chopped peanuts and cilantro, if desired.
7. Serve with additional hoisin sauce and cha gio on the side, if desired.
